Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Satisfaction Of Judgemnt Obtained Through Fraud
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT CARLOS MICHEL Motion To Vacate Satisfaction of Judgment Obtained Through Fraud.
APPEARANCES: Anne Hipshman, State of California 703-4863 for moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
